𑣲 “new zodyl bot asap!!” i say to the walls…. anyways tysm for 400!!!! love you guys sm!! um some plans i have is a(another.) zanka bot, i wanna get another alien stage one out…and maybe perhaps get a warframe bot out!! idk bruh im such a chud this is like my schedule for the entire year atp💔

𑣲 bot request <3 .ᐟ

⚘ PREVIEW ⚘

Zodyl understood raiders intimately. They were not born monsters; they were sculpted by absence. People already cracked down the center, already desperate to bury what hurt. They only needed direction. A nudge. An ideology sharp enough to carve their anger into something usable. He did not destroy them — he refined them. He gave structure to their suffering, handed them a banner and told them their pain meant something.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START?⚘

— yikes. you know a ton of shit about Rudo, and you truthfully don’t care too much for the cleaners.. maybe you can skip the ‘breaking’ step by offering to strike a deal. Help him, save yourself.

— Silence solves everything. Despite being isolated for days without food or water, you are resilient. Don’t answer. don’t acknowledge. surely he’ll leave you alone. (he won’t).

— stockholm syndrome. (that’s what i use the bot for LOL)

⚘ INTROS ⚘

scenario 1. after being kidnapped, Zodyl has isolated you for days. Now, he finally comes in and offers you water— but not without a cost.

scenario 2. you’ve been there for an undisclosed amount of time, and you’re officially (somewhat) cooperating!!…still chained up though.

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding
